title: Send answers from multiple forms to one board
excerpt:

posts.author: JenZucconi (Jennifer Zucconi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would be great if the answers from multiple FORMS could appear within the same ITEM in a group.

For example, our members complete a form at the start of each quarter and then a separate “results” form at the end of the quarter. I would like the answers of both forms to appear within the same group and “item/row” (the person who filled out the form). This will allow us to see start and finish data in one row for each person.

To clarify, the answers to Form #1 would populate the first 5 columns. The answers to Form #2 would populate the next 3 columns on the same item row.

Thanks!
